about.subtitle: About Us
about.description: With over 10 years of experience, we offer you the highest quality products. Each product is carefully selected and packaged.
about.naturalDesc: Pure natural products without any chemical additives
about.healthDesc: Rich in vitamins and minerals, beneficial for the body
about.deliveryDesc: Delivery service to Baku and regions
about.qualityDesc: Premium quality products carefully selected from reliable sources
about.storyPart1: Çərəz store started as a small business in 2014. Our goal was simple: to offer people the purest and tastiest products.
about.storyPart2: Today, thousands of families across Azerbaijan enjoy healthy eating with us. And we continue to remain committed to quality with the same passion every day.
about.storyPart3: Behind every product of ours lies love, care and family values.

faq.title: We Answer Your Questions
faq.subtitle: Find the most frequently asked questions here. If you have additional questions, contact us.
faq.contactText: Couldn't find the answer to your question?
faq.deliveryCostQuestion: How much is the delivery cost?
faq.deliveryCostAnswer: Delivery cost varies depending on the order quantity and address.
faq.howToOrderQuestion: How do I place an order?
faq.howToOrderAnswer: Orders are accepted either through the website, WhatsApp, or by phone call.
faq.deliveryTimeQuestion: How long does it take to deliver after placing an order?
faq.deliveryTimeAnswer: Orders are usually delivered within 24 hours. Delivery time may vary depending on the address, region, and other conditions.
faq.paymentMethodsAnswer: Cash, card, or online payment is possible.
faq.returnPolicyQuestion: Can products be returned or exchanged?
faq.returnPolicyAnswer: Due to food safety, opened products cannot be returned. However, in case of wrong or damaged products, replacement or refund is carried out if contacted within 24 hours.

reviews.title: What Our Customers Say?

review2.text: We order from here every week for our restaurant.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy defines the rules for collecting, processing and protecting personal data of individuals using the services provided by Cherez.az.

general.title: 1. General Provisions
general.clause1: 1.1. By using the site, the user is deemed to have accepted the terms of this Privacy Policy.
general.clause2: 1.2. The user is responsible for the accuracy and currency of the information provided.

collectedData.title: 2. Collected Information
collectedData.clause1: 2.1. The following information voluntarily provided by the user may be collected:

purposes.title: 3. Purposes of Data Processing
purposes.clause1: 3.1. The collected information is used for the following purposes:

list.marketing: Marketing and information (based on user consent)

protection.title: 4. Data Protection and Storage
protection.clause1: 4.1. The company implements appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect user data.
protection.clause2: 4.2. Personal data is stored and protected in accordance with legal requirements.

thirdParty.title: 5. Transfer to Third Parties
thirdParty.clause1: 5.1. User data may be transferred to third parties in the following cases:
thirdParty.clause2: 5.2. In other cases, data is not shared without the user's consent.

security.title: 6. Data Security
security.clause1: 6.1. We use modern encryption technologies (SSL) to ensure the security of your data.
security.clause2: 6.2. Your personal data is stored on protected servers and can only be accessed by authorized personnel.

cookies.title: 7. Cookies
cookies.clause1: 7.1. The site may use cookies to improve user experience.

userRights.title: 8. User Rights
userRights.clause1: 8.1. The user has the following rights:

list.correction: Request correction or deletion of data

changes.title: 9. Changes
changes.clause1: 9.1. This Privacy Policy may be amended from time to time.
changes.clause2: 9.2. Changes take effect as soon as they are posted on the site.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: If you have any questions about our Privacy Policy, please contact us:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using the Cherez.az website, you agree to the following Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our site.

general.title: 1. General Provisions
general.clause1: 1.1. Any person using the site is deemed to have agreed to these terms.
general.clause2: 1.2. The store reserves the right to change these terms without prior notice.

registration.title: 2. Registration and User Account
registration.clause1: 2.1. Users must register to place an order.
registration.clause2: 2.2. The user is responsible for the accuracy of the information provided.
registration.clause3: 2.3. The user is obliged to protect the confidentiality of their account information.

orderPayment.title: 3. Order and Payment Terms
orderPayment.clause1: 3.1. All prices are shown in AZN (Azerbaijani Manat).
orderPayment.clause2: 3.2. Prices may be changed without prior notice.
orderPayment.clause3: 3.3. Orders are placed through the site via the cart system.
orderPayment.clause4: 3.4. Payment is only accepted upon delivery of the order.
orderPayment.clause5: 3.5. There is no online payment system on the site.

delivery.title: 4. Delivery Rules
delivery.clause1: 4.1. The delivery time is communicated to the user after order confirmation and is approximate.
delivery.clause2: 4.2. The company is not responsible for delays caused by an incorrect address provided by the user.
delivery.clause3: 4.3. Upon delivery, the product should be inspected and any discrepancy reported immediately.

products.title: 5. Products and Liability
products.clause1: 5.1. We are not liable if the site is temporarily down due to technical issues.
products.clause2: 5.2. Product images on the site are for informational purposes.
products.clause3: 5.3. Availability and prices may change without prior notice.

liability.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
liability.clause1: 6.1. The store is not responsible for problems arising from incorrect or incomplete information provided by the user.
liability.clause2: 6.2. The store is not liable for temporary suspension of service due to technical failures.

return.title: 7. Return and Exchange Conditions
return.clause1: 7.1. Due to food safety, opened products cannot be returned.
return.clause2: 7.2. Exceptions may apply only in the following cases:
return.clause3: 7.3. In such cases, the user must contact the store upon receipt of the product or within 24 hours at the latest.
return.clause4: 7.4. After reviewing the request, the store decides on replacement or return of the product.

list.damaged: If the product is spoiled, of poor quality, or damaged
list.wrongProduct: If a different product is delivered than ordered

cancellation.title: 8. Cancellation
cancellation.clause1: 8.1. The user can cancel the order only before delivery has been carried out.
cancellation.clause2: 8.2. Once the delivery process has begun, cancellation may not be possible.

changes.title: 9. Changes to Terms
changes.clause1: 9.1. The store reserves the right to change these Terms of Service at any time. Changes take effect as soon as they are posted on the site.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: If you have any questions about our Terms of Service, please contact us:
